title: USB Charger
description: Brings back the USB Charger from the 1.RV-Pre1 April Fools' snapshot.
body:
Brings back the USB Charger from the 1.RV-Pre1 April Fools' snapshot.

It is nearly identical to the block from the joke snapshot, with the same crafting recipe, block properties, and redstone output power.

Once you craft a USB Charger, you can connect it to redstone wires to power your redstone contraptions, similarly to a Redstone Block.
